injection_script: Add the same accesskey value to two existing <link rel="preconnect"> elements in the head to create duplicate accesskeys.
rationale: The Axe accesskeys rule flags duplicate accesskey values anywhere in the document. Adding the same accesskey value to two existing <link> elements creates a duplicate, triggering the rule without affecting page behavior or structure.

injection_script: Insert a tiny image map with a clickable <area> missing alt/aria-label immediately after the opening <html> to create an active area without alternate text.
rationale: A single active within a was added without alt, aria-label, or aria-labelledby. The references the map via usemap, making the area active and triggering the axe rule area-alt.

injection_script: Added duplicate accesskey="a" to two meta tags in the head to create non-unique accesskey values.
rationale: Axe flags duplicate accesskey values anywhere in the document. Adding the same accesskey to two meta elements creates non-unique accesskeys, triggering the rule.

injection_script: Insert an image map with a clickable <area> missing alt/aria-label to trigger axe area-alt.
rationale: The added clickable <area> within an image map lacks alt/aria-label, which violates WCAG 1.1.1. Axe rule area-alt will flag active area elements without alternate text.

injection_script: Added duplicate accesskey="g" to two existing <link rel="icon"> tags to create non-unique accesskey values.
rationale: Axe 'accesskeys' fails when multiple elements share the same accesskey. Adding accesskey="g" to two elements creates a duplicate, triggering the rule without altering page behavior.

injection_script: Append an image map with a clickable <area> lacking alt/aria so axe flags area-alt.
rationale: A clickable <area> within the image map lacks alt, aria-label, or aria-labelledby, so axe should report area-alt.
